parameters.jsCode:
const proxy = $('Run WA US Dynamic IP').first().json || {};
return [{ json: { success: false, status: 'DYNAMIC_IP_UNAVAILABLE', error_message: proxy.error_message || 'dynamic IP unavailable', phone: $('Normalize Registration Input').first().json.phone, proxy: { proxy_mode: proxy.proxy_mode || 'US_RANDOM_DYNAMIC_IP', country_code: proxy.country_code || 'US' } } }];
